item.title: Workrave 1.11.0-rc.4
item.description:
Workrave 1.11.0-rc.4 has been released.
- Translations: - Added Georgian translation (#669, NorwayFun) - Update Dutch translation - Bug fixes: - Rest Break window no longer appears in top left corner in "No Lock" mode (#663, 664, ValdikSS) - Fix Gnome Shell extension (#661, Nick kousu) - Fix application icon on Linux

item.title: Workrave 1.11.0-rc.4
item.description:
Workrave 1.11.0-rc.4 has been released.
- Translations: - Added Georgian translation (#669, NorwayFun) - Update Dutch translation - Bug fixes: - Rest Break window no longer appears in top left corner in "No Lock" mode (#663, 664, ValdikSS) - Fix Gnome Shell extension (#661, Nick kousu) - Fix application icon on Linux

item.title: Workrave 1.11.0-rc.2
item.description:
Workrave 1.11.0-rc.2 has been released.
- Improvements: - Allow Workrave to ignore idle inhibitors if possible (#596, J. J. Ramsey) - Add examples of usage with swaybar (#597, J. J. Ramsey) - Support GNOME Shell 48 - Update DBus example (#611, Emmanuel Ferdman) - Support for user defined colors (#619) - Port workrave Python scripts for waybar, etc., to dasbus (#627, J. J. Ramsey) - Phil Dibbs contributed new sounds (bells_ensemble, shangri_la, synth_harp, tinkle_bell, tuned_udu, woodwind_ensemble) - Support GNOME Shell 49 (#636, Alessandro Astone) - Keyboard/mouse locking now works on ARM64 Windows - Handle screen lock shortcut during breaks under Xorg - Add high DPI support on Windows (#650, Charlie Lin) - Use Gnome Shell extension to display prelude windows (#621) - It is no longer required to accept the GPL license on installation on Windows (#648) - Bug fixes: - Fix crash when monitor is powered off (#606) - Fix an empty AppIndicator menu (#556, #614, wojnilowicz) - Fix issue where the tray icon did not appear on waybar, swaybar, or wf-shell trays (#555, #613, wojnilowicz) - Fix issue where the status window shows when Sway reloads despite being disabled (#612, #615, wojnilowicz) - Update AppIndicator menu when menu content changes (#556, #652,ValdikSS) - Updated Translations: - Update Chinese translation (#645, Sisyphe42) - Updated Indonesian translation (#653, Andika Triwidada) - Fix French translation (#656)

item.title: Workrave 1.11.0-rc.2
item.description:
Workrave 1.11.0-rc.2 has been released.
- Improvements: - Allow Workrave to ignore idle inhibitors if possible (#596, J. J. Ramsey) - Add examples of usage with swaybar (#597, J. J. Ramsey) - Support GNOME Shell 48 - Update DBus example (#611, Emmanuel Ferdman) - Support for user defined colors (#619) - Port workrave Python scripts for waybar, etc., to dasbus (#627, J. J. Ramsey) - Phil Dibbs contributed new sounds (bells_ensemble, shangri_la, synth_harp, tinkle_bell, tuned_udu, woodwind_ensemble) - Support GNOME Shell 49 (#636, Alessandro Astone) - Keyboard/mouse locking now works on ARM64 Windows - Handle screen lock shortcut during breaks under Xorg - Add high DPI support on Windows (#650, Charlie Lin) - Use Gnome Shell extension to display prelude windows (#621) - It is no longer required to accept the GPL license on installation on Windows (#648) - Bug fixes: - Fix crash when monitor is powered off (#606) - Fix an empty AppIndicator menu (#556, #614, wojnilowicz) - Fix issue where the tray icon did not appear on waybar, swaybar, or wf-shell trays (#555, #613, wojnilowicz) - Fix issue where the status window shows when Sway reloads despite being disabled (#612, #615, wojnilowicz) - Update AppIndicator menu when menu content changes (#556, #652,ValdikSS) - Updated Translations: - Update Chinese translation (#645, Sisyphe42) - Updated Indonesian translation (#653, Andika Triwidada) - Fix French translation (#656)

item.title: Workrave 1.11.0-rc.2
item.description:
Workrave 1.11.0-rc.2 has been released.
- Improvements: - Allow Workrave to ignore idle inhibitors if possible (#596, J. J. Ramsey) - Add examples of usage with swaybar (#597, J. J. Ramsey) - Support GNOME Shell 48 - Update DBus example (#611, Emmanuel Ferdman) - Support for user defined colors (#619) - Port workrave Python scripts for waybar, etc., to dasbus (#627, J. J. Ramsey) - Phil Dibbs contributed new sounds (bells_ensemble, shangri_la, synth_harp, tinkle_bell, tuned_udu, woodwind_ensemble) - Support GNOME Shell 49 (#636, Alessandro Astone) - Keyboard/mouse locking now works on ARM64 Windows - Handle screen lock shortcut during breaks under Xorg - Add high DPI support on Windows (#650, Charlie Lin) - Use Gnome Shell extension to display prelude windows (#621) - It is no longer required to accept the GPL license on installation on Windows (#648) - Bug fixes: - Fix crash when monitor is powered off (#606) - Fix an empty AppIndicator menu (#556, #614, wojnilowicz) - Fix issue where the tray icon did not appear on waybar, swaybar, or wf-shell trays (#555, #613, wojnilowicz) - Fix issue where the status window shows when Sway reloads despite being disabled (#612, #615, wojnilowicz) - Update AppIndicator menu when menu content changes (#556, #652,ValdikSS) - Updated Translations: - Update Chinese translation (#645, Sisyphe42) - Updated Indonesian translation (#653, Andika Triwidada) - Fix French translation (#656)
